name: John's Steak Bomb Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Shaved, blood rare, roast beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a small skillet and a large griddle-type pan.
2. Place grated cheese on top of slices of bread.
3. Spread garlic butter on the bottom side of each piece of bread in the griddle.
4. Cook the bread until it is heated, crispy, and the cheese has melted.
5. In the skillet, brown sliced onions for a few seconds.
6. Dice up the serrano peppers and add to the skillet for about 30 seconds.
7. Add roast beef to the skillet and squeeze the lime juice into the pan.
8. If concerned about seeds, strain the lime juice through a fine mesh.
9. Add Inner Beauty Sauce and mix well until the sauce is incorporated.
10. Reduce heat to ensure the mixture is not watery.
11. Place portions of roast beef on top of pumpernickel bread in separate pans.
12. Close each sandwich with rye bread, ensuring each sandwich has one slice of each type (this step is optional).
13. Slice the sandwiches in half and serve.
